sourceMovie.title: Halloween Ends
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Halloween Ends for the same reason it broke through in 2022: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. David Gordon Green keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Halloween Ends clicked for you, Halloween (1978) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Halloween Ends?
faq.answer: Try Halloween, Halloween, Insidious: Chapter 2—each shares DNA with Halloween Ends while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Halloween Ends?
faq.answer: Halloween Ends (2022) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Halloween Ends part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Halloween Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
